VISITING JUDGE:CARLOS BAKER/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DAVID DAVENPORT C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL RICHARD DUDUM, AND DEFT WENDY ROBINSON PRESENT & REPRESENTING HERSELF. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD. DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED ON OTHER DEFENDANTS BRENDIA ROBINSON AND TANDY ROBINSON ON 12/10/96. A"JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION" WAS SIGNED BY THE JUDGE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, BRENDIA ROBINSON, TANDY AS DOE 1 ROBINSON, WENDY AS DOE 2 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1959 HAYES STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-07-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
